COMPLEX LITIGATION 304, HEARING OF PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT, SET FOR JUN-12-2026, IN DEPT. 304, IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT CIRCULATED A WRITTEN TENTATIVE RULING. THE PARTIES STIPULATED IN ADVANCE OF THE HEARING. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. (D304)
